results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Position-aware depth allocation per-token in decoder generation IS the position-pattern non-uniform decode budget mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Dynamically allocating FLOPs to specific positions + top-k routing per layer IS the 12-cycle non-uniform per-position decode budget mechanism.
Bayesian-surprise dynamic routing + fixed-capacity Top-K covers content-driven dynamic allocation paradigm.
Dynamic per-token compute resource allocation IS the per-position non-uniform compute mechanism.
Skip-softmax sparse attention with skip mask covers headless silent-beat gated skip mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Dynamic token halting + per-token early exit IS the per-position non-uniform compute allocation mechanism.
Hierarchical sparse attention with dynamic skip-mask covers non-uniform per-position compute saving.
Flexible attention mask supporting non-uniform per-position gated skip covers headless silent-beat gated mask mechanism.
